description: End-to-end eval dataset: one Senior AI Engineer JD, 10 CVs, ground truth + per-CV realistic expected score band based on experience gap + skill match.

job_form.title: Senior AI Engineer
job_form.description: We are looking for a seasoned Senior AI Engineer to lead our AI/ML initiatives. You will design and deploy production-grade AI systems, mentor junior engineers, and own the architecture for LLM-powered products. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business goals into scalable AI solutions and drive technical decisions across the AI stack.
job_form.requirements: 5+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering, deep expertise in LLMs (fine-tuning, RAG, prompt engineering), strong MLOps and system design skills, production deployment on AWS/GCP, experience mentoring engineers, proficiency in Python and modern ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow)

post_agent_eval_criteria.name: covers_all_requirements
post_agent_eval_criteria.definition: Does the post mention all the key requirements from the input form: 5+ years experience, LLM fine-tuning/RAG/prompt engineering, MLOps and system design, production AWS/GCP deployment, mentoring, Python and ML frameworks?

post_agent_eval_criteria.name: professional_tone
post_agent_eval_criteria.definition: Is the tone professional, recruiter-appropriate, and free of casual or unprofessional language?

post_agent_eval_criteria.name: has_clear_cta
post_agent_eval_criteria.definition: Does the post include a clear call to action telling the candidate how to apply (e.g., 'Fill the form to apply' link or contact info)?

post_agent_eval_criteria.name: appropriate_length
post_agent_eval_criteria.definition: Is the post a reasonable LinkedIn length (not too short like 3 lines, not extremely long beyond ~600 words)?

expected_score_band.rationale: 3.1y AI/ML with LLM/RAG hands-on but ~2y short of senior, no AWS/mentoring experience visible.
Junior Data Scientist 3.3y with forecasting focus, lacks LLM/RAG expertise needed for senior AI role.

ground_truth.name: Amna Anwar
ground_truth.last_education_institution: University of Management and Technology, Lahore

expected_score_band.rationale: AI Engineer MS AI with strong GenAI/RAG/LLM skills but only 3y vs required 5y, lacks senior-level AWS/mentoring.

ground_truth.name: Muhammad Abbas Raza
ground_truth.last_education_degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

expected_score_band.rationale: 3.3y AI/ML with RAG/LangChain/AWS production work, partial fit but 1.7y short on experience.

ground_truth.name: Mirza Abdul Wadood Baig
ground_truth.last_education_degree: BSc Electrical Engineering (Major in Computer Science)

expected_score_band.rationale: Senior Gen-AI Engineer 4.5y with multi-agent/LangChain/RAG production at Northbay, strong fit only 0.5y short.
3.3y Python Developer with AI/ML/RAG production work, but title indicates non-senior role and 1.7y short.
~5y total (incl. 2y freelance) AI/ML + Automation, LLM/RAG/PEFT fine-tuning experience meets senior requirement.

ground_truth.name: Daniyal Sheikh
ground_truth.last_education_degree: MS Artificial Intelligence and Autonomous Systems

expected_score_band.rationale: 4y ML Engineer (Motive + Vyro), MS AI from NUST, strong transformer/RAG/LangChain skills, 1y short.

ground_truth.name: Syed Anas Ali
ground_truth.last_education_degree: Bachelors of Science in Electrical Engineering

expected_score_band.rationale: 2.9y AI Developer with LLM/RAG/Azure work, 2y short and uses Azure (not preferred AWS/GCP).
2.5y Deep Learning Engineer (projects-based, not production), CNN/LSTM focus rather than LLM/RAG.
